data.title: Bill Ackman Loaded Up On Nike, Now This Analyst Says Stock Expected To Shoot Up 32% By 2027 Thanks To These Factors
data.description: Nike's turnaround strategy can propel the stock by 32% to $97 says this analyst as Bill Ackman loads up on the shares.

Infrastructure Products Distributor MRC Global Plans Stock Buyback; Shares Climb
data.description: MRC Global announced a $125 million share repurchase program, boosting premarket stock gains. The initiative, running through January 2028, aligns with the company's focus on operational efficiency and shareholder value.
